calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
Gilbert Yee Jay, Esq. for Plaintiff Marcus Lee, present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence and the testimony of Mr. Lee, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Marcus Lee and against the defendant Raymond Hung Kwong, AM&C Development Inc.,
and Baymark Investments, Inc.
Punitive Damages Waived (Statement was not served on defendants)
Principal of $31,635.00
Attorney's fees of $6,327.00
Interest of $3,892.93
Costs of $314.50
For the total of $42,169.43
Judgment signed in open court.
